---
title: "Changelog"
subtitle: "Year-over-year changes across the registry"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
library(reactable)

events <- amr_read_json("changelog.json")$events %||% list()

fmt_val <- function(v) {
  if (is.null(v)) return("<span class='amr-callno'>—</span>")
  s <- amr_json(v, pretty = FALSE)
  if (nchar(s) > 80) s <- paste0(substr(s, 1, 80), "…")
  sprintf("<code>%s</code>", htmltools::htmlEscape(s))
}

df <- if (length(events)) do.call(rbind, lapply(events, function(e) {
  sys <- e$assessment_system_id %||% e$accountability_system_id %||% ""
  data.frame(
    Jurisdiction = e$jurisdiction_id %||% "",
    System = sys,
    Area = e$content_area %||% "",
    Years = sprintf("%s → %s", e$year_from %||% "?", e$year_to %||% "?"),
    Field = e$field %||% "",
    From = fmt_val(e$from),
    To = fmt_val(e$to),
    Kind = e$record_type %||% "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})) else data.frame()
```

Each entry is a change to an authored value between two consecutive years for the same
jurisdiction and system — a vendor swap, a scale transition, a revised cutscore vector, or an
altered accountability target. Re-establishments and corrections surface here as explicit,
reviewable signals.

```{r}
#| label: changelog
if (!nrow(df)) {
  htmltools::tags$p(class = "amr-callno", "No changes recorded.")
} else reactable(
  df[, c("Jurisdiction", "System", "Area", "Years", "Field", "From", "To", "Kind")],
  columns = list(
    Jurisdiction = colDef(width = 110),
    System = colDef(minWidth = 120),
    Area = colDef(width = 110),
    Years = colDef(width = 120),
    Field = colDef(width = 110),
    From = colDef(html = TRUE, minWidth = 130),
    To   = colDef(html = TRUE, minWidth = 130),
    Kind = colDef(width = 120, filterable = FALSE)
  ),
  searchable = TRUE,
  filterable = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 20,
  highlight = TRUE,
  borderless = TRUE,
  defaultSorted = list(Jurisdiction = "asc", System = "asc"),
  class = "amr-catalog"
)
```
